plugins.name: agent-cowork
plugins.description: Toolkit for agent cooperation covering three areas: (1) team public rules (AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md) lifecycle — draft-public-rules (draft generation from project analysis), refine-boundaries (error-driven Boundaries accumulation), audit-public-rules (anti-pattern diagnosis and consent-based improvement); (2) multi-repo shared documentation via git submodule — shared-docs (init, sync, write/PR, doctor; GitHub Flow with GitHub and GitLab support, resolves paths/URLs from .gitmodules with no separate config file); (3) agent context handoff brief generation — handoff (ephemeral brief Markdown for cross-agent or cross-teammate task transfer).

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Miscellaneous personal skills: pdf-parser, claude-hook-notify-setup, docs-to-md (fetch tech docs as local Markdown), fsd-docs (Feature-Sliced Design v2.1 knowledge pack), my-backend-architecture (Progressive-Disclosure knowledge skill for a personal FSD-inspired backend architecture with NestJS-centric examples; covers layer dependency rules, slice boundaries, ORM strategies for TypeORM/Drizzle/Prisma, DIP patterns, and static module-boundary enforcement tooling).

plugins.name: ddd-workshop
plugins.description: DDD pipeline — 6 conversational skills following the canonical strategic-then-tactical order. requirements-refiner (Pre-DDD: context + UL base language + 8-item self-audit), event-storming-explorer (Big Picture Event Storming + subdomain *identification* only, no classification), subdomain-classifier (narrowed: Core/Supporting/Generic + Slice-first target), context-designer (Bounded Context + Context Map + per-BC Canvas with embedded per-BC Ubiquitous Language in bilingual 용어/Code Identifier/의미 format; cross-BC terms go to optional published-language.md), screen-inventory (optional per-BC screen list surfacing read-paths without wireframes), aggregate-designer (Design-Level Event Storming + Aggregate + Invariant/Policy + Exposed Queries cross-checked against screen-inventory; Aggregate-reconstruction-for-reads forbidden). Artifacts live in docs/shared/contexts/<bc>/ with no YAML frontmatter.
